title: Workshops & Courses
description: Discover our diverse range of workshops and courses designed to enhance your skills and knowledge.

hero.title: Interactive Workshops
hero.subtitle: Discover our specialized workshops designed to enhance learning through practical experience and expert guidance.

filters.noResults: No workshops found matching your filters.

customCTA.title: Looking for a Custom Workshop?
customCTA.description: We can create a tailored program that perfectly matches your organization's needs and goals.

statisticsProject.title: Statistics Project Course
statisticsProject.description: Comprehensive statistics workshops for entire classes or small groups. Perfect for high school students working on research projects, with flexible scheduling options to accommodate class schedules.
details: Available for entire classes or small groups

mathInnovation.title: Math Teachers Innovation Workshop
mathInnovation.description: Workshop for math teachers focusing on innovative teaching methods, incorporating technology and modern approaches to engage students better.

aiMath.title: AI & Mathematics Workshop
aiMath.description: Explore the intersection of artificial intelligence and mathematics. Learn how AI can enhance mathematical understanding and problem-solving.

musicProduction.title: Music Production & DJ Workshop
musicProduction.description: Learn the basics of music production and DJing, from creating beats to mixing tracks. Perfect for anyone interested in music, technology, or performance.

analogPhotography.title: Analog Photography & Editing
analogPhotography.description: Explore the art of analog photography using professional cameras. Learn about film selection, development, and digital post-processing.

visualStorytelling.title: Visual Storytelling & Design
visualStorytelling.description: Learn to communicate visually through graphic design. Master color, composition, and typography using professional tools.

creativeCoding.title: Creative Coding: Art & Animation
creativeCoding.description: Combine programming and art using Python. Create interactive visuals and animations while learning coding basics.

aiArt.title: AI & Creativity Workshop
aiArt.description: Explore the intersection of AI and art. Learn to use AI tools for creating unique artworks and music.
details: Introduction to AI art generation tools
Creating digital artwork with AI assistance
Ethics and future of AI in creative fields

escapeRoom.title: Escape Room Design Workshop
escapeRoom.description: Learn to design and program escape room puzzles. Combine storytelling, technology, and problem-solving in this unique workshop.
details: Test and refine escape room experiences

dataVisualization.title: Data Visualization with Python
dataVisualization.description: Learn to create stunning data visualizations using Python libraries like Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly. Perfect for both students and teachers looking to enhance their data presentation skills.

mathGames.title: Mathematical Game Design
mathGames.description: Create engaging mathematical games using simple programming tools. Learn how to make math fun and interactive for students through game-based learning.
details: Game design principles for educational content
Using programming tools for math games

mathArt.title: Mathematical Art & Patterns
mathArt.description: Explore the beautiful intersection of mathematics and art. Create stunning visual patterns using mathematical principles and digital tools.
details: Use digital tools for mathematical art

mathModeling.title: 3D Mathematical Modeling
mathModeling.description: Learn to create 3D models using mathematical principles. Perfect for visualizing geometric concepts and creating educational materials.

mathStorytelling.title: Mathematical Storytelling
mathStorytelling.description: Learn to create engaging stories that incorporate mathematical concepts. Perfect for teachers looking to make math more accessible and interesting.
details: Adapting stories for different age groups

mathPodcasting.title: Mathematical Podcasting
mathPodcasting.description: Create engaging audio content about mathematical concepts. Learn podcast production and storytelling techniques for educational content.

mathVideo.title: Educational Math Videos
mathVideo.description: Learn to create engaging educational math videos. Master video production techniques and visual explanation methods.

mathAssessment.title: Innovative Math Assessment
mathAssessment.description: Explore innovative ways to assess mathematical understanding using technology and creative methods.

mathDifferentiation.title: Differentiation in Math Education
mathDifferentiation.description: Learn effective strategies for differentiating math instruction to meet diverse student needs.

mathMindfulness.title: Mindfulness in Mathematics
mathMindfulness.description: Integrate mindfulness techniques into mathematics education to reduce anxiety and improve focus.
details: Understanding math anxiety and its impact
Practical mindfulness techniques for the classroom

mindfulness.title: Mindfulness
mindfulness.description: Learn mindfulness techniques to reduce stress and improve mental health.

timeManagement.title: Time Management
timeManagement.description: Learn effective time management techniques to improve productivity and reduce stress.

examPreparation.title: Exam Preparation
examPreparation.description: Learn effective exam preparation strategies to improve exam performance.
